Step.label: Select Handler
Step.notes:
System_IncomingCall - New incoming call from external partyl
SystemIntercomAttributeSync - Intercom call to a non system queue
System_InitiateCallRequest - New incoming internal call
SystemIVRForwardQueue.ihd - Call Coverage routed call
System_TransferCallRequest2 - Blind transfer
SystemCallOfferingSystemQueue - Transfer to system queue after Queue Timeout or Escape event
CustomSubroutineInitiatorRouter - Subroutine call from attendant profile
AcdQueueItemTimeout - Queue Timeout event occured
NAllo_RTDS_QueueHandling_QueueEscape - Queue Escape event from handler NAllo_RTDS_QueueHandling

Parameter.label: Trace Message
Parameter.value: c_sTraceLogTag & "No Next Step defined. End Call"

Parameter.label: Trace Message
Parameter.value: c_sTraceLogTag & "Operation does't exist. DS Key=" & sRTDSpath

Parameter.label: Call should be moved to the System Queue
True: Claim control of this call
